news.t: How To Avoid The Worst Style ETFs 1Q22

holdings.infoBox: XSHD is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are Innovative Industrial Properties stock at 3.79%, Apple Hospitality REIT at 3.33%, Cal-Maine Foods at 3.20%, Kinetik Holdings at 3.19%, and Robert Half at 3.15%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap High Dividend Low Volatility ETF (XSHD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a dividend-yield-weighted index of the 60 least volatile stocks chosen from a list of the 90 highest-yielding US small-cap stocks. XSHD was launched on Dec 1, 2016 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P SmallCap 600 Low Volatility High Dividend

data.title: How To Avoid The Worst Style ETFs 1Q22
data.text: The large number of ETFs has little to do with serving investors' best interests. Here are three red flags investors can use to avoid the worst ETFs.
